programs.title: Activate Your Japanese!
programs.desc: . Learn how to make the most of your Japanese skills. Watch our drama that features useful communication strategies, our snappy videos about onomatopoeia, and our documentaries on "senpai" in Japan.

programs.title: Dig More Japan
programs.desc: . NHK WORLD-JAPAN features all kinds of programs to capture kids' imaginations and foster creativity. Let's dig a little deeper.

programs.title: Dining with the Chef mini
programs.desc: . Featured recipe: Cherry Blossom-shaped Crab Rice/ Learn about Japanese home cooking with Master Chef Saito, based on traditional Japanese cooking techniques in five minutes.

programs.title: Sumopedia
programs.desc: . Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with insights into the sport’s techniques, traditions and legendary wrestlers. While the rules are simple, this iconic Japanese sport has far more depth than meets the eye.

programs.title: Nhk Newsline
programs.desc: . NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programs.title: The World Heritage Sites in Japan
programs.desc: . From natural landscapes to historic architecture representing centuries of cultural development, Japan's World Heritage sites offer a wide range of glimpses into history and the beauty of nature.
